columns.name: identity_key
columns.sqlType:
text
  generated always as (public.inventory_item_identity(title, notes, unit)) stored

triggers.name: on_inventory_movements_sync_balances
triggers.activation: after insert or update or delete

triggerUsages.activation: after insert or update or delete

policies.name: order_lines_insert
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.orders o
    where o.id = order_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(o.project_id)
  )

policies.name: order_lines_update
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.orders o
    where o.id = order_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(o.project_id)
  )
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.orders o
    where o.id = order_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(o.project_id)
  )

policies.name: order_lines_delete
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.orders o
    where o.id = order_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(o.project_id)
  )

policies.name: order_lines_select
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.orders o
    where o.id = order_id
      and public.can_access_project(o.project_id)
      and public.can_view_sensitive_detail(o.project_id)
  )

policies.name: inventory_movements_insert
policies.withCheck:
public.can_write_project_content(project_id)
  and (created_by is null or created_by = auth.uid())
